New legal documents have been passed to the Premier League during the past 24 hours that raise fresh questions about whether the controversial £300m Saudi Arabia-funded takeover of Newcastle United should get the go-ahead, the Guardian can reveal.

Premier League lawyers are understood to be reviewing information which is said to establish a firm link between the Saudi government and a homegrown pirate TV and streaming service which offers illegal access to sporting events – including English football, Wimbledon and the Six Nations – on the BeoutQ platform.

The new evidence means that any decision to approve the Newcastle takeover by a consortium involving Saudi Arabia’s public investment fund, Reuben Brothers and Amanda Staveley – which had been expected within days – is expected to be pushed back.

球員怕怕：丹尼路斯直播爆粗反對復賽 - 童健
英國政府剛公佈新一份放寬防疫措施的指引，英超聯賽將有望在6月1日之後，以閉門作賽形式重開。不過，紐卡素後衞丹尼路斯與曼城翼鋒史達寧，均表明反對在武漢肺炎仍然肆虐下重啟聯賽，其中前者更爆粗回應這個決定。

英超各隊周一召開會議，繼續討論「Project Restart」的安排。除了曼城前鋒阿古路及車路士中堅魯迪格等早前已對復賽表示擔憂，今季被熱刺外借到紐卡素的丹尼路斯，也透過ig「開Live」表明反對重啟賽季，還忍不住爆粗：「復賽簡直是他媽的笑話！政府說要重啟足球聯賽，振奮國民士氣，我完全不在乎這些，老兄，人民的性命正受到威脅啊！」他說：「在（受感染及死亡）數字大幅回落之前，我們都不應討論恢復足球比賽，那根本是廢話。」

另一名英格蘭國腳、曼城前鋒史達寧，亦認為目前並非重啟聯賽的時機，他在個人YouTube頻道上說：「我們不應只為競賽原因貿然重返球場，我們不僅要關注球員的安全，還要顧及所有醫護人員及球證。我不是害怕，但的確（對復賽）有所保留，我們要向最壞的情況設想。」
文︰童健

英超賽事自3月初暫停，電視轉播亦告停頓，即使賽事即將在6月復賽，到時亦會有電視轉播，但已不是原來的時間表，並非電視台的黃金時段，因此電視台要求回水，經電視台計算，退款數額為3.4億鎊。

英超CEO馬斯達斯表示，如果英超腰斬，賽會將至少虧蝕10億鎊，因此英超唔可以停，無論如何都要重開。

The House of Commons Digital, Culture, Media and Sport Committee could investigate the potential takeover of Newcastle United by a Saudi-backed consortium after committee member Giles Watling urged it to hold an evidence session.

But what is the Committee, and what does it do?

The House of Commons has a number of committees - sometimes known as select committees - which scrutinise the work of Government departments. In this case, we're talking about the Department for Digital, Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS).

The MPs who sit on committees come from all the political parties. The DCMS Committee has six Conservatives, four Labour MPs - including Sunderland Central MP Julie Elliott - and one SNP MP.

Strictly speaking, they are meant to report on the work of the Government. They don't directly investigate issues such as the ownership of football clubs. But the Committee could ask whether the Government should be acting to block the NUFC takeover, and it seems this is what Mr Watling wants to do.

It may seem a little odd that Mr Watling is saying this when he is a Conservative MP, and the Conservative Culture Secretary, Oliver Dowden, has already said he doesn't plan to intervene.

But it's not that unusual for backbench MPs on Commons committees to give Government ministers a hard time, even when they are in the same party (this is also true when there's a Labour Government). They see it as their job to ask whether the Government is doing the right thing.

The Committees have the power to summon witnesses and force them to answer questions. This could include, for example, representatives of the Premier League, as well as Government ministers.

In theory, they could actually take legal action against anyone who refused to answer their questions, at least if they are British citizens.

Mike Ashley eventually gave evidence to the Commons Business, Innovation and Skills select committee in 2016, despite initially refusing, after he was issued with a formal legal summons.

As a general rule, anyone who is asked to speak to a Commons committee does so. This would probably include Premier League managers. Not everyone has Mr Ashley's appetite for a fight.

What power does the DCMS Committee hold?

The formal powers of a committee are limited. All they can do is ask questions and produce a report setting out their findings. They can't force the Government to change its policy.

But each Committee represents the entire House of Commons. Their reports are published by Parliament, receive a lot of publicity and the conclusions can be debated in the Commons Chamber, where a Minister is forced to respond.

The Government is also forced to write a written response to each report.

So in practice, a Committee such as the Department for Digital, Culture, Media and Sport Committee is hard to ignore and has the potential to embarrass ministers or the other organisations its members choose to write about.

新班主疫境開水喉
德甲重開前，哈化柏林球迷收到天大喜訊，富豪班主雲賀斯特宣布將向球會注資最多1.5億歐元（約12.6億港元），令佢哋成為德甲喺新冠肺炎疫情下最富貴球會！雖然哈化護級仲未真正「上岸」，但已經諗緊喺嚟緊轉會窗大展拳腳，達斯拿、卡利奧斯、謝路美保定等德國球星都盛傳將被哈化柏林收購。

身為投資控股公司巨頭嘅雲賀斯特，上年成功購入哈化柏林49.9%股份（德甲50+1股權條例上限），對上兩個轉會窗都出重金買人，包括盧克巴基奧同比亞迪克等貴價球星，雖然疫情全下全個球壇都呻窮，但雲賀斯特反而宣布會加大投資，佢接受《南德意志報》訪問嗰陣表示：「我哋已經準備將投資1億歐元或者1.5億歐元，視乎球隊需要，我哋會揀一個合適時間作出行動。」

當拜仁慕尼黑都話因為疫情而要睇緊盤數，轉會市場唔會再出重手之際，雲賀斯特就為自己嘅投資自豪：「我好開心自己嘅加入同貢獻，令哈化柏林成為德甲少數財政健康球隊，至少依家唔需要為疫情而憂心。」哈化柏林喺德甲停擺期間亦行動多多，包括聘請名帥拉巴迪亞執教，又搵名宿列文加入管理層。

增兵吼達斯拿謝路美保定
據德國傳媒報道，哈化柏林已經制定一份增兵名單，頭號獵物係喺巴黎聖日耳門失寵嘅德國進攻中場達斯拿，球會又同拜仁慕尼黑老將謝路美保定進行接觸，另外仲向利物浦收購門將卡利奧斯，而且當球隊宣布護級成功後，新一批增兵名單亦陸續有嚟。哈化柏林喺德甲重開第1擊，將會於周六晚作客賀芬咸。

加納美斯
基斯甸艾素
Christian Atsu
年齡：28歲
球會：紐卡素
談美斯比較：「我跟美斯或許有相似的地方，但我們不一樣。被拿來跟美斯比較不會影響我，我很集中建立自己的形象。」
基斯甸艾素坦言從小於加納長大，一直視美斯為偶像。他在2009年離鄉別井初登歐洲簽約波圖，很快就被車路士羅致；不過縱然有加納美斯之美名，也曾為國家隊於非國外踢得精采，他只是藍戰士外借兵團中不起眼的一人，最終在2017年加盟紐卡素。現在，基斯甸艾素在英超有不少上陣機會，但已經28歲了，跟美斯的距離仍然很遠。

沙特阿拉伯王儲穆罕默德‧薩勒曼收購紐卡素一事再出現阻滯，英國《太陽報》指最少有10間英超球會反對佢入主「喜鵲」，因為擔心穆罕默德‧薩勒曼成為紐卡素班主之後，以沙特國內盜播英超情況，可能影響各球會喺中東嘅轉播利益。
早前已傳出英超高層喺今年2月聯絡美國貿易代表辦公室(USTR)，通報沙特國內盜看英超嘅情況非常嚴重，要求USTR將沙特列入觀察名單，英超賽會亦不滿穆罕默德‧薩勒曼收購紐卡素。
加上今次以曼城、利物浦、曼聯、車路士為首嘅大球會提出反對，令呢股「反收購」力量愈來愈大，英超賽會亦開始審核收購文件，以目前情況下，隨時會叫停呢單3億鎊交易。
不過，穆罕默德‧薩勒曼收購歐洲球會嘅決心並冇改變，英國《鏡報》指如果佢買唔到紐卡素，就會轉為收購意甲球隊羅馬。

Sources: Huge Newcastle takeover update as PL probe set to complete

The Premier League are close to signing off the deal for the Saudi consortium to buy Newcastle United, Football Insider understands.
The ruling body have overseen a forensic investigation into allegations of illegal streaming involving the Saudi government and a homegrown pirate TV and streaming service.
A Newcastle source has told Football Insider that the Premier League has yet to find sufficient evidence to support blocking Mike Ashley’s proposed £300m sale.
Football chiefs have been keen to hold a thorough probe after new legal documents were passed to them last week.
This meant a decision to approve the Newcastle takeover by a consortium involving Saudi Arabia’s public investment fund, Reuben Brothers and Amanda Staveley had to be pushed back.
However, there is how growing confidence PCP Partners’ £300million takeover will soon be ratified.
That is a massive boost for Newcastle fans, the majority of whom have thrown their weight behind the takeover and the plans for huge investment in the club and playing squad.
It would also bring an end to the reign of Mike Ashley, who is a deeply unpopular figure among the fanbase.
The delay in announcing the takeover, backed by Saudi Arabian crown prince Mohammed bin Salman, has led to suggestions Ashley may consider alternative buyers.
However, a deposit has been paid and all the relevant paperwork has been signed, and the deal will be finalised if it gets Premier League approval.
In other Newcastle United news, it can be REVEALED that senior midfielder is unlikely to play for the club again after transfer talks.

英國《太陽報》指，英超賽會已批准紐卡素以3億鎊（約28.4億港元）售予沙地阿拉伯財團。

英國傳媒上月報道，沙地阿拉伯王儲穆罕默德（Mohammad bin Salman）將以3億鎊收購喜鵲，並由英國著名投資中介人絲塔維莉（Amanda Staveley）旗下公司PCP Capital Partners牽頭，跟紐卡素班主艾殊利進行談判。據悉，雖然雙方早已達成協議，但由於受到武漢肺炎疫情影響，英超方面要到最近才通過這宗交易。《太陽報》指，絲塔維莉正着手進行資金過戶及最後階段的文書工作，預料收購行動下周便會得到正式批准，並將於6月1日正式對外公佈。

早前有報道指，以穆罕默德為首的公共投資基金（Public Investment Fund）將佔紐卡素的8成股權，絲塔維莉的公司佔1成，另外1成則由地產商Reuben brothers持有。

其實，紐卡素今次易手並非一帆風順，儘管原有的班主艾殊利並不得人心，但沙地阿拉伯近年人權紀錄欠佳，穆罕默德更被指為異見記者卡舒吉被殺的幕後黑手，令收購行動遇到不少反對聲音。除此之外，沙地政府亦涉嫌縱容當地電視台盜播英超賽事，惹來轉播商不滿，但事件最終仍然無阻穆罕默德入主紐卡素。

【掃平障礙】報道指英超開綠燈 沙地王儲等做紐卡素新班主

我又上鏡啦
英國《太陽報》指，英超賽會已批准紐卡素以3億鎊（約28.4億港元）售予沙地阿拉伯財團。

英國傳媒上月報道，沙地阿拉伯王儲穆罕默德（Mohammad bin Salman）將以3億鎊收購喜鵲，並由英國著名投資中介人絲塔維莉（Amanda Staveley）旗下公司PCP Capital Partners牽頭，跟紐卡素班主艾殊利進行談判。據悉，雖然雙方早已達成協議，但由於受到武漢肺炎疫情影響，英超方面要到最近才通過這宗交易。《太陽報》指，絲塔維莉正着手進行資金過戶及最後階段的文書工作，預料收購行動下周便會得到正式批准，並將於6月1日正式對外公佈。

早前有報道指，以穆罕默德為首的公共投資基金（Public Investment Fund）將佔紐卡素的8成股權，絲塔維莉的公司佔1成，另外1成則由地產商Reuben brothers持有。

其實，紐卡素今次易手並非一帆風順，儘管原有的班主艾殊利並不得人心，但沙地阿拉伯近年人權紀錄欠佳，穆罕默德更被指為異見記者卡舒吉被殺的幕後黑手，令收購行動遇到不少反對聲音。除此之外，沙地政府亦涉嫌縱容當地電視台盜播英超賽事，惹來轉播商不滿，但事件最終仍然無阻穆罕默德入主紐卡素。

The Saudi Arabian Public Investment Fund have re-iterated their commitment to "invest" during the coronavirus crisis as the Newcastle United takeover enters the eighth week of Premier League checks.

The PiF, who will take an 80% stake in United if the Premier League decide to pass the takeover bid, has been granted an extra $40 billion from government reserves in the last few days to snap up firms in distress.

PiF have spent billions on high-profile entertainment, travel and leisure investments and want to add Newcastle to their portfolio. But they have said nothing about the United bid so far.

Arab News carries a quote from a PiF spokesman that confirms they are looking at "global investment opportunities" during the coronavirus.

隨著紐卡斯爾聯隊的收購進入英超聯賽檢查的第八週，沙特阿拉伯公共投資基金重申了在冠狀病毒危機期間“投資”的承諾。

如果英超決定通過收購要約，PiF將獲得80％的股份。最近幾天，PiF已從政府儲備中獲得了額外的400億美元，以收購陷入困境的公司。

PiF已在娛樂，旅遊和休閒方面進行了數十億美元的投資，並希望將紐卡斯爾加入其投資組合。 但到目前為止，他們對聯合競購一無所獲。

阿拉伯新聞社引述PiF發言人的話，證實他們正在尋找冠狀病毒期間的“全球投資機會”。

Confident position from the Shields Gazette here. Piracy issues apparently ironed out a few weeks ago.

Saudis bullish about attaining TV rights, with a source saying “whatever Qatar bid, we’ll add £50m to that.” #nufc

盾牌公報的位置自信。 盜版問題顯然已經在幾週前解決。

沙特阿拉伯對獲得電視轉播權寄予厚望，有消息人士稱“無論卡塔爾競標如何，我們都將為此付出5,000萬英鎊。” #nufc
